prompt: Use the exec tool to count the .java files in src/main/java (recursively). On Windows use `dir /s /b src\main\java\*.java` (or `find ... | find /c ".java"`); on Linux/Mac use `find src/main/java -name "*.java" | wc -l`. After getting the count, reply with the number and the word 'EXEC-DONE' on the same line.
